zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hampden於大約1398年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Edmund Hampden60歲，母親Joan Belknap28歲。他於1423年與Elizabeth Whalesborough在英國英格蘭可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年2月17日在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hampden于大约1398年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Hampden60岁，母亲Joan Belknap28岁。他于1423年与Elizabeth Whalesborough在英国英格兰可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年2月17日在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hampden was born about 1398, in England, his father, Sir Edmund Hampden, was 60 and his mother, Joan Belknap, was 28. He married Elizabeth Whalesborough in 1423, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 17 February 1458, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hampden est né environ 1398, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Hampden, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Joan Belknap, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Whalesborough en 1423, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1458, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hampden um 1398 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Hampden 60 und seine Mutter Joan Belknap 28. Er hat 1423 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Whalesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1458 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hampden è nato il circa 1398 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Hampden, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Joan Belknap, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Whalesborough nel 1423, nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1458, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hampdenが約1398年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Hampdenは60歳，母Joan Belknapは28歳であった。1423年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウでElizabeth Whalesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年2月17日に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hampden(이)가 대략 1398년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Hampden(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Belknap(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 화알스버루에서 Elizabeth Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 2월 17일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hampden nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Hampden, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Joan Belknap, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Whalesborough em 1423, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1458, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hampden родился около 1398 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Hampden было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Belknap, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Whalesborough в 1423 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 17 февраля 1458 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hampden nació aproximadamente 1398, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund Hampden, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Joan Belknap, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Whalesborough en 1423, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1458, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
